module_description: Monitors connectivity to database servers including MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, and more. Supports TCP, Unix socket, and SSH tunnel connections.

hints.alert_connections: Warn when the server's active connection count exceeds this value (0 = disabled). Only engines that expose it: MySQL/MariaDB, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Redis/Valkey, Memcached.
hints.threads: Number of entries to check in parallel.
hints.label: Optional display name shown in notifications and the dashboard instead of the item key.
hints.conn_type: How to reach the server: TCP direct connection, Unix socket file, or TCP tunnelled over SSH.
hints.host: IP address or hostname of the database server. Used for TCP and SSH tunnel modes. When the check is bound to a host it stays editable on purpose: over an SSH tunnel the database often lives on a different machine reachable only from that host (e.g. 127.0.0.1 or an internal Docker/private address). Leave it empty to fall back to the bound host's address.
hints.port: TCP port the server is listening on. Use 0 to apply the engine default (MySQL/MariaDB: 3306, PostgreSQL: 5432, MSSQL: 1433, MongoDB: 27017, Redis/Valkey: 6379, Elasticsearch/OpenSearch: 9200, InfluxDB: 8086, Memcached: 11211).
hints.token: InfluxDB 2.x API token. Takes precedence over user/password when set.
hints.db: Database / bucket / index name. You can list several (comma-separated) — the picker lets you select multiple — and the check then verifies that every one of them exists on the server. For Elasticsearch/OpenSearch/InfluxDB the picker filters indices/buckets.
hints.socket: Full path to the Unix domain socket file. Used only in socket mode.
hints.timeout: Connection timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default; blank uses the global.
hints.ssh_host: Hostname or IP of the SSH jump server.
hints.ssh_port: SSH port on the jump server (default 22).
hints.ssh_password: Password for the SSH connection. Leave empty when using a key file.
hints.ssh_key: Path to the SSH private key file. Takes precedence over the SSH password when both are set.
hints.ssh_key_string: Private key content in PEM/OpenSSH format (alternative to the key file path). Takes precedence over the key file. The SSH password, if set, is used as the key passphrase.
hints.ssh_verify_host: When enabled, the SSH host key must already be in ~/.ssh/known_hosts — an unknown or changed key aborts the connection (protects against MITM). When disabled, any host key is accepted on first contact.
hints.scheme: HTTP or HTTPS for Elasticsearch / OpenSearch / InfluxDB.
hints.tls: Enable TLS / SSL for the connection.

action_labels.list_databases_tt: Fetch the list of available databases from the server
